stories.headline: What to know about the renewed coordinated attacks across Mali
stories.description: Separatist Tuareg-led group and regional al-Qaeda affiliate have claimed responsibility for attacks on army positions.

stories.headline: World Cup 2026: Mexico squad return watches gifted by content creator Stevewilldoit
stories.description: World Cup co-hosts Mexico - who play England on Sunday night - return luxury watches gifted to them ...

stories.headline: Bodies found dead in crashed car believed to be missing men
stories.description: William Hutchinson was last seen on 24 June and Stuart Tallis was reported missing three days later.

stories.headline: Jailed Gaza hospital chief in life-threatening condition, rights group says
stories.description: Elyas Abu Safia says his father Hussam can barely breathe or speak after more than 555 days in Israeli prison.

stories.headline: Life-size Lego bench built in memory of Guernsey's Matthew Girard
stories.description: The bench is made in memory of Matthew Girard who died in 2020 from cancer.
